name: Plague Ship
briefing: DISTRESS SIGNAL RECEIVED — derelict freighter MSV Korinthia, last known position Sector 7. Survivors aboard. Pathogen unknown. Board with extreme caution and prepare the medical bay. Science, run a pathogen sweep the moment we're in range. Medical, stand by for triage.

objectives.text: Receive and process the distress signal
Diagnose and treat the infected survivors
Hold position while the outbreak is contained (60 seconds)
